\tzpentry{ID4372}{Tunnel Quantum Cymatic Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4372 introduces Tunnel Quantum Cymatic Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \Hhat_{\text{tunnel}} &= -\frac{\hbar^2}{2 m_{\mathrm{eff}}} \nabla^2 + V_{\mathrm{barrier}}(r,\theta,\phi,t), \\ \Hhat_{\text{SC}} &= \sum_{k} (\varepsilon_k - \mu) \left(c_{k\uparrow}^\dagger c_{k\uparrow} + c_{k\downarrow}^\dagger c_{k\downarrow}\right) + \Delta \sum_k \left( c_{k\uparrow}^\dagger c_{-k\downarrow}^\dagger + \text{h.c.} \right), \\ \Hhat_{\text{cymatic}} &= \int \rho(\mathbf{r},t)\,\Phi_{\text{acoustic}}(\omega,\mathbf{k},t)\,\mathrm{d}^3 r, \end{align}
